calendar.matters:
REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (959-961 Valencia St, San Francisco, Ca)
Off Calendar Apr-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with (Trustee) Debra Dolch.

The court stated that the trust owns 90.25% of the property but that the sale would be for 100%. The sale was confirmed at $1,056,999.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed on March 18, 2015. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt & review of the order). An additional bond is not necessary.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

Petition To Enforce Trust, Compel Funding Of Decedents Trust, For An Accounting, And To Remove Trustee And To Appoint Successor Trustee.
Off Calendar Aug-25-2010 Continued To Oct-27-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer Leece for Walter Hambrecht. Donald Dowling for Theodore Langlais.

Counsel agreed to participate in mediation but disagreed as to the length of time of the trial, the need to do discovery and setting the trial date at this time. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation is to be completed by October 22, 2010. The matter was continued to October 27, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status of mediation and for prompt setting of the trial.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
